summary: Verified all 5 bug fixes: Portfolio contrast (#6), Email signature settings (#5), Settings tabs, autoGenerateContract (#3). Backend API tests 100% pass, frontend UI tests pass.
passed_tests: Portfolio page: 'My Portfolio' heading visible in dark text (rgb(26,26,46)) on light background
Portfolio empty state: 'Showcase your best work' heading visible in dark text
Add Work modal: WHITE background (rgb(255,255,255)) - NOT dark slate
Add Work modal: Form labels (Title, Description, Category, Tags) visible with proper contrast
Add Work modal: Input fields have dark text (rgb(26,26,46)) on white background
Settings modal: All 5 tabs visible - Currency, Brand, Reviews, Email, Account
Settings Email tab: EmailSignatureSettings component loads correctly
Email Signature: Textarea for signature input present
Email Signature: Preview button works, shows formatted preview section
Email Signature: Save Signature button works, shows 'Saved!' feedback
Email Signature GET API: Returns emailSignature field in settings response
Email Signature PATCH API: Accepts and persists emailSignature field
Email Signature persistence: Value persisted and returned on subsequent GET
autoGenerateContract called when quote is accepted (line 951)
critical_code_review_comments: Portfolio.tsx contrast fixes verified: text-text-primary classes applied to headings and labels
Modal bg-white class correctly applied (not bg-slate-900)
EmailSignatureSettings.tsx properly fetches/saves signature via GET/PATCH /api/settings
SettingsModal.tsx correctly includes Email tab with EmailSignatureSettings component
settings.ts includes emailSignature in SETTINGS_SELECT and profileFields for PATCH
schema.prisma has emailSignature String? field on User model
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bugs verified fixed: (1) Portfolio contrast - text-text-primary on light background, (2) Add Work modal - bg-white not bg-slate-900, (3) Contract auto-gen - autoGenerateContract function exists line 121 in quotes.ts, (4) Email signature - new EmailSignatureSettings component in settings Email tab, (5) Settings tabs - all 5 tabs visible. Email signature API fully working (GET/PATCH /api/settings with emailSignature field).
